name: solo-npm
description: Twelve AI skills for every npm command a solo dev runs — publish, version, dist-tag, deprecate, audit, outdated, view, owner, login + 2FA + OIDC. Bootstrap (/init scaffolds release.yml + publishConfig + wrappers + cache; /trust configures OIDC Trusted Publishing). Ship (/release auto-chains to /prerelease on pre-release version, /trust on missing trust, /deprecate after major; /verify runs lint+typecheck+test+build+pkg-check with auto-fix offers). Lifecycle transitions (/prerelease for alpha/beta/rc start/bump/promote with aggregated changelog; /hotfix with cherry-pick automation on <major>.x branches for forward-port and backport). Operate the portfolio (/status multi-channel dashboard + maintenance lines; /audit 4-tier risk classification chains to /deps or /deprecate; /deps tier-batched verify-gated upgrades; /dist-tag manages post-publish channels including cleanup-stale; /deprecate for range-aware mass deprecation; /owner for portfolio bus-factor management). OIDC + provenance baked into publish; foolproof npm login handoff for registry mutations. Composes with addyosmani/agent-skills for development phases.
author: Gabriel Llamas
